name: Jail Cell
hints: You are trapped in a jail cell! The door is closed. Look for a way out.
OPEN DOOR to try to escape. The advertising leaflet is just flavor text.
OPEN DOOR or try to break free. READ LEAFLET for a Scott Adams advertisement.
notes: Jail cell that can trap you. The door must be opened to escape. The leaflet is a Scott Adams game advertisement. Getting locked in here may require a restart if you cannot open the door.
